perks.name: Novice Illusion
perks.description: You've taught yourself a few Novice level spells and learned how to cast them with decreased effort while your newfound knowledge also allows you to augment the strength and duration of all Illusion spells.

perks.name: Perceptual Illusions
perks.description: Perceptual illusion effects such as chameleon, dampen, hallucination, invisibility, muffle, night-eye, and sound are more effective and easier to cast. [1.25x magnitude, 1.25x duration, 0.9x cost for perceptual spells]

perks.name: Environmental Manipulation
perks.description: Perceptual illusion spells are improved with additional effects. [Improved effect for perceptual spells]

perks.name: Shadow Shaping
perks.description: Shadow magic effects such as sanctuary, shadow drain, shadow step, shadow stride, and shadow summon are more effective and easier to cast. [1.25x magnitude, 1.25x duration, 0.9x cost for shadow spells]

perks.name: Obliterate the Mind
perks.description: Delusive illusion spells are improved with additional effects. [Improved effect for delusive spells]

perks.name: Emotional Illusions
perks.description: Emotional illusion effects such as calm, charm, command, fear, frenzy, and rally are more effective and easier to cast. [Increased success chance, 1.25x magnitude, 1.25x duration, 0.9x cost for emotional spells]

perks.name: Domination
perks.description: Emotional illusion spells are improved with additional effects. [Improved effect for emotional spells]

perks.name: Delusive Illusions
perks.description: Delusive illusion effects such as blind, death, nightmare, noise, pain, silence, and sleep are more effective and easier to cast. [Increased success chance, 1.25x magnitude, 1.25x duration, 0.9x cost for delusive spells]

perks.name: Apprentice Illusion
perks.description: By pursuing your apprenticeship in Illusion, you've gained knowledge of Apprentice level spells which you now augment while casting them with less effort.

perks.name: Adept Illusion
perks.description: By advancing further into the school of Illusion, you've gained some Adept level spells and learned how to augment and cast spells of this rank more easily.

perks.name: Expert Illusion
perks.description: You've unlocked almost every secret in the school of Illusion and you've acquired some Expert level spells. You can now cast spells of this level easier and augment them to an almost otherworldly extent.

perks.name: Master Illusion
perks.description: Your knowledge of Illusion has become all-encompassing. You taught yourself a Master level spell and you can cast the most complex spells from this school with less effort while augmenting them beyond mortal limits.

perks.name: Empowered Illusion
perks.description: Dual casting an Illusion spell overcharges the effects into an even more powerful version.

perks.name: Master of Shadows
perks.description: Shadow illusion spells are improved with additional effects. Shadow summons last longer. [Improved effect for shadow spells, 4x duration for shadow summon spells]

perks.name: Mesmerize
perks.description: Your emotional illusion spells seep deep into the targets' mind, further reducing their chance to break free. [Increased success chance and 2x duration for emotional illusion spells]

perks.name: Deceptive Image
perks.description: You can stack illusory image on yourself to deceive your enemies, making their attacks miss and expose their weak spots. [25% chance to take no physical damage and 25% chance to ignore 50% of enemy's armor rating while perceptual illusion spells are active]

perks.name: Curse
perks.description: Curse your enemies with dark magic, weakening their body and soul. [1.25x physical damage, spell magnitude, and spell duration on targets under delusive illusion effects]

perks.name: Shadows of Conflict
perks.description: Draw power from forces in conflict, absorbing energy from nearby enemies and creating another reflection of shadow. [Absorb 50% magicka regeneration from nearby enemies while shadow spells are active, +2 shadow summon limit]
